_invariant: triage + overlay + stress_test all read ONLY from this registry. No hidden tuning. No content changes — only parameter edits.

heat_gain_rate.risk: High values collapse A window — do not exceed 2.0 without buffer_phase enabled

police_response_delay.risk: Values below 0.5s cause instant collapse — enforces no A window

encounter_start_angle_variance.risk: Values above 35 make encounter entry unpredictable — can break spatial memory

rival_aggression.risk: Values above 1.8 can cause E saturation — rival + police simultaneously = no A window

escape_route_density.risk: Adding routes without AI response creates empty options — each grammar needs distinct pursuit behavior

vehicle_handling_variance.risk: High variance can destroy spatial memory — vehicles behave inconsistently per-encounter

heat_decay_threshold.risk: Low threshold collapses R variety — keep at least 2 viable exit conditions per E-class

pursuit_break_strength.risk: Values above 1.8 create arbitrary exits that ignore player state — legibility drops

loose_coupling_noise.risk: Values above 0.35 produce R smear — state clustering breaks down

landmark_salience_weight.risk: Over-salient landmarks create tourist behavior — players navigate to them instead of through them
